findings.title: Skills Content spec is section-scoped rather than full-file
evidence: The design includes exact replacement sections for SKILL.md, reference.md, roles/research.md, and roles/design.md, but not the full contents of those files.
findings.recommended_fix: Convert section-scoped content specs into full-file edits when implementation starts.

findings.title: caption-image.js model invocation path is contractually defined but not mechanically fixed
evidence: The design defines purpose, schema, and workflow placement for caption-image.js without locking the exact built-in-model invocation mechanism.
findings.recommended_fix: Resolve the concrete multimodal invocation path in the implementation plan before coding Phase 2 helpers.
